explanation: Bat, Ball, Glove, and Bases are all fundamental pieces of equipment used specifically in the game of baseball. A Racket is used in sports like tennis or badminton, not baseball.

category: Status of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
explanation: Four of these (Lighthouse of Alexandria, Hanging Gardens of Babylon, Colossus of Rhodes, Temple of Artemis) were among the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World that have been destroyed or are no longer largely intact. The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the original Seven Wonders that largely remains standing today.
Sight, Smell, Taste, and Touch are four of the five traditional physical senses. Intuition is considered a 'sixth sense' or a feeling, not a direct physical sense.
